case_title: MIKE GARVEY et al RESPONDENT VS. STRACK, RALPH D. DBA SPORTS CAR HAUS APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: MINUTES FOR JUL-10-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

DEPT. 525: PRO TEM JUDGE GARY GRAY, CLERK-BETH WILBER: C/C FOR TRIAL DE NOVO ON A SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL; RESPONDENTS/PLAINTIFFS IN PRO PER MIKE & CHANTILLY GARVY ARE PRESENT IN COURT; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT/DEFENDANT IN PRO PER RALPH D. STRACK; THE COURT ALSO TAKES NOTICE THAT NOTICE WAS MAILED TO APPELLANT/DEFENDANT ABOUT AN OUTSTANDING CHECK; APPEAL IS DISMISSED; SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2003 - OFF CALENDAR
